content:
I can see the paper content provided, but it only contains the abstract and header information. The abstract does not include Theorem 3 or any discussion of efficiency conditions related to correlation between high-value users and others.

To answer your question about Theorem 3's efficiency condition and how correlation determines efficiency versus inefficiency, I would need access to the main body of the paper where Theorem 3 is stated and proved.

Could you provide the section of the paper that contains Theorem 3? This would typically be in the model setup, equilibrium analysis, or comparative statics sections.
